products.name: Omron BP Monitor
products.subtitle: HEM-7120 Electronic Upper Arm Blood Pressure Monitor
products.description: Equipped with Intellisense technology that automatically applies the right amount of pressure for fast, accurate and comfortable readings. Highly trusted by clinics across UAE.

products.name: Pulse Oximeter
products.subtitle: Finger Pulse Blood Oxygen Saturation (SpO2) Monitor
products.description: Compact and precise blood oxygen level evaluator. Clips comfortably to the index fingertip with high brightness LED display indicating real-time oxygen percentage and current pulse rate.

products.name: Nebulizer Compressor System
products.subtitle: Compressor Medical Aerosol Steam Inhaler System
products.description: High efficacy medicine nebulization system built to administer liquid bronchodilators to customers diagnosed with asthma, bronchitis, or COPD. Suitable for pediatric and adult care.

products.name: Isolate Whey Protein
products.subtitle: Chocolate flavor Premium Isolate Protein Supplement (1kg)
products.description: Premium ultra-filtered isolate protein. Perfect for fast nutrient delivery during post-rehabilitation exercise, senior muscle mass enhancement, or weight-management plans.

enquiries.message: Hi, do you provide 24/7 nursing companion for a customer recovering from a stroke? What are the monthly rates?
